notableEvents.label: Trevor Story GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Wilyer Abreu out at 2nd. Trevor Story out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras GIDP
